analysisResult.goal: To provide a mobile app for fitness enthusiasts to efficiently track diet, calories, macros, and progress.

features.name: Quick Meal Entry
features.description: Allow users to log meals quickly through a streamlined interface.

features.name: AI-Assisted Food Recognition
features.description: Utilize AI to recognize food items from images for automatic logging.

features.name: Macro Tracking
features.description: Enable users to track their macro intake for each logged meal.

features.name: Error Handling
features.description: Provide feedback and error messages for invalid meal entries.

features.name: Weekly Insights
features.description: Display weekly insights on diet and performance metrics.

features.name: Goal Tracking
features.description: Allow users to set and track their fitness goals over time.

features.name: Data Visualization
features.description: Provide visual representations of progress through charts and graphs.

features.name: Export Data
features.description: Allow users to export their progress data for external analysis.

data.title: Log Meal
data.description: Add a new meal to the logging system.

config.functionCode: const updatedMeals = [...inputData.meals, inputData.newMeal]; return { meals: updatedMeals };

prdReference.rationale: This task logs a new meal into the system.

data.title: Macro Tracking
data.description: Enable users to track their macro intake for each logged meal.

data.title: Calculate Macros
data.description: Compute macro values for logged meals.

config.functionCode: const totalMacros = { protein: 0, carbs: 0, fat: 0 }; inputData.meals.forEach(meal => { totalMacros.protein += meal.protein || 0; totalMacros.carbs += meal.carbs || 0; totalMacros.fat += meal.fat || 0; }); return { macros: totalMacros };

prdReference.rationale: This task calculates the macro values for meals.

data.title: Display Macros
data.description: Show macro information to the user.

prdReference.rationale: This task displays the macro information to the user.
This group allows users to track their macro intake.

data.title: Weekly Insights
data.description: Display weekly insights on diet and performance metrics.

data.title: Fetch Weekly Insights
data.description: Retrieve weekly insights from the database.

config.functionCode: return { weeklyInsights: [{ week: 'Week 1', caloriesConsumed: 15000, caloriesBurned: 12000, macros: { protein: 150, carbs: 200, fats: 50 } }] };

prdReference.requirement: Display weekly insights on diet and performance metrics.
prdReference.rationale: This task retrieves the latest weekly insights for display.

data.title: Goal Tracking
data.description: Allow users to set and track their fitness goals over time.

data.title: Set Fitness Goal
data.description: Allow users to set a new fitness goal.

config.functionCode: return { goals: [...inputData.goals, { goal: 'Lose weight', target: 5, progress: 0 }] };

prdReference.requirement: Allow users to set and track their fitness goals over time.
prdReference.rationale: This task enables users to add new fitness goals.

data.title: Update Goal Progress
data.description: Update the progress of a specific fitness goal.

config.functionCode: return { goals: inputData.goals.map(goal => goal.goal === 'Lose weight' ? { ...goal, progress: goal.progress + 1 } : goal) };

prdReference.requirement: Allow users to set and track their fitness goals over time.
prdReference.rationale: This task updates the progress of the user's goals.

prdReference.requirement: Allow users to set and track their fitness goals over time.
prdReference.rationale: This group node manages user fitness goals.
